prompt: Full-body stylized anime character portrait of a tough green-haired swordsman in modern streetwear, standing confidently with hands in the pocket of a glowing emerald hoodie emblazoned with a neon skull-and-crossed-swords emblem, three ornate katanas sheathed at his hip and slung across his back, tactical beige cargo joggers with armored knee pads and utility straps, chunky green-and-gold high-top sneakers, layered bracelets and a rugged backpack. Stern expression, single eyebrow scar, short spiky hair, subtle wind effect, electric green energy crackling around the blades and hoodie seams. Crisp clean linework, high-detail shading, cinematic rim lighting, bold contrast, saturated greens and warm neutrals, poster-style composition with Japanese and English typography block in the background, dynamic but balanced pose, ultra-detailed textures on fabric, metal, leather, and blades, dramatic depth of field, 4k illustrative finish.
